## Runtime.Session.MoldedBonBonEditingSession.fromPersistedState() method

Restores a MoldedBonBonEditingSession from persisted state. Note: Child filling sessions are persisted separately and should be accessed via their persisted session IDs from IPersistedConfectionSession.childSessionIds.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static fromPersistedState(baseConfection: RuntimeMoldedBonBon, history: Session.ISerializedEditingHistoryEntity<IProducedMoldedBonBonEntity>, context: ISessionContext, params?: IConfectionEditingSessionParams): Result<MoldedBonBonEditingSession>;
```
